semantic.role: Prompt generation public facade – re-exports high-level prompt constructors for atlas documents, configs, folders, projects, sources, and markdown prompts, shielding consumers from internal prompt module restructuring.
responsibilities: Provide a stable import boundary for all prompt generation capabilities used by CLI commands, views, and service layers.
Re-export PromptBuilder as the primary builder pattern for constructing prompt objects.
Re-export generateConfigPrompt to produce prompts for atlas configuration settings.
Re-export generateDocumentPrompt to produce prompts for atlas documentation units.
Re-export generateFolderPrompt to produce prompts for folder-level index or summary.
Re-export generateProjectPrompt to produce prompts for overall project context.
Re-export generateMarkdownPrompt to produce markdown-formatted prompts from structured data.
Re-export generateSourcePrompt to produce prompts for individual source file analysis.
outOfScope: Internal prompt rendering logic, retry mechanics, language model interaction, context assembly, and low-level formatting utilities – these live in submodules under src/infra/prompt/ and should not be resolved through this facade.
invariants: All external callers MUST import prompt generation symbols from this re-export module, NEVER from the deep implementation submodules (src/infra/prompt/*).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a stable, single-point-of-entry for prompt generation to isolate the codebase from refactors of the internal prompt module structure.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No significant semantic changes to this file; recent commits performed release gate fixes and synced accumulated source changes without altering the re-export contract.

publicSurface.description: Primary class/factory for constructing prompt objects step-by-step. Consumed by services that need to assemble a prompt from parts.
Generates a prompt string or structure for atlas configuration. Called by the config command and bootstrap logic.
Generates a prompt for a single atlas document (e.g., source descriptions, rule docs). Used by document-backfill and summarize tasks.
Generates a prompt for a folder-level summary or index. Consumed by the summarizer when processing directories.
Generates a prompt for the entire project context. Used by init and top-level aggregation flows.
Generates a markdown-formatted prompt from structured data. Used by the view rendering subsystem for producing human-readable outputs.
Generates a prompt for a single source file's analysis (AST, public surface, etc.). Consumed by the scanner and AST extractor tasks.
